name: Real Estate AI Sales Assistant - Milestone 3

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const history = d.messageHistory || [];
const userMsg = d.userMessage || '';

// Build readable conversation history without duplicate user message
const histLines = history
  .filter(function(m) { return !(m.role === 'user' && m.content === userMsg); })
  .map(function(m) { return (m.role === 'user' ? 'Customer: ' : 'Sofia: ') + m.content; })
  .join('\n');

const prevCtx = ' Previously captured qualifications: ' + JSON.stringify(d.currentLead || {})
  + ' Previously captured contact details: ' + JSON.stringify(d.currentLeadCapture || {});

const prompt = 'You are a data extraction assistant for a real estate agency.\n\n'
  + 'Conversation history:\n' + (histLines || '(start of conversation)')
  + '\n\nLatest customer message: ' + userMsg + '\n\n'
  + prevCtx + '\n\n'
  + 'Extract and return ONLY a valid JSON object with these exact fields. Use empty string "" for unknown text fields and 0 for unknown numbers. Do not include markdown codeblocks or backticks. Return ONLY the JSON object:\n\n'
  + '{\n'
  + '  "intent": "buy" | "rent" | "sell" | "invest" | null,\n'
  + '  "city": string | null,\n'
  + '  "area": string | null,\n'
  + '  "budget_max": number | null,\n'
  + '  "bedrooms_min": number | null,\n'
  + '  "timeline": string | null,\n'
  + '  "deal_type": "sale" | "rent" | null,\n'
  + '  "needs_property_search": boolean,\n'
  + '  "latest_message_action": "new_search" | "refine_search" | "property_followup" | "booking_request" | "contact_details_provided" | "preferred_time_provided" | "seller_request" | "general_question" | "out_of_scope" | "unclear",\n'
  + '  "customer_name": string,\n'
  + '  "phone": string,\n'
  + '  "email": string,\n'
  + '  "requested_action": "more_details" | "schedule_viewing" | "speak_to_agent" | "valuation_request" | "general_question" | "",\n'
  + '  "selected_property_reference": string,\n'
  + '  "preferred_date_time": string,\n'
  + '  "search_reason": string\n'
  + '}\n\n'
  + 'EXTRACTION RULES:\n'
  + '1. deal_type is "sale" for buy/invest, "rent" for rent.\n'
  + '2. needs_property_search = true ONLY if intent + city + (budget_max or bedrooms_min) are known and latest_message_action is new_search or refine_search.\n'
  + '3. If visitor asks to view/visit/schedule/book a viewing: latest_message_action="booking_request", requested_action="schedule_viewing".\n'
  + '4. If visitor provides name, phone or email: latest_message_action="contact_details_provided".\n'
  + '5. If visitor provides preferred date/time: latest_message_action="preferred_time_provided".\n'
  + '6. If visitor asks for details about a shown property: latest_message_action="property_followup", requested_action="more_details".\n'
  + '7. If visitor wants to speak with human/agent: requested_action="speak_to_agent".\n'
  + '8. If visitor wants to sell/value property: requested_action="valuation_request".\n'
  + '9. Do not classify as "invest" unless user explicitly mentions investment, yield, buy-to-let, tenant, or ROI.';

const reqBody = {
  model: 'claude-haiku-4-5',
  max_tokens: 350,
  messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }]
};

return {
  claudeRequestBody: JSON.stringify(reqBody),
  sessionId: d.sessionId,
  userMessage: d.userMessage,
  messageHistory: d.messageHistory,
  currentLead: d.currentLead,
  currentLeadCapture: d.currentLeadCapture,
  timestamp: d.timestamp
};
